hypothesis: L1.1 local transfer: the paper-frozen ExECT S5 stack (high-recall pre-vocab candidates, AM guard, reject-only frequency verifier v1, A3 prompt policy) transfers to Qwen3.6:35b on the full fixed validation split with acceptable per-family regression vs the GPT 4.1-mini anchor.
metric_caveats: These are partial ExECT S5 diagnostics (five core families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across five families is not comparable to frozen S4 eleven-family or S3 nine-family headlines.

Program variant, prompt version, verifier policy, candidate builder, and AM guard are held fixed against GPT paper-frozen run exect_s5_frequency_pre_vocab_am_guard_frequency_verify_full_gpt4_1_mini_20260524T195813Z.
Only seizure_frequency candidates are injected; S1–S3 and medication_temporality pre-vocab lists are omitted.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/policies/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Do not compare this run to GPT metrics as the same experiment without explicit model_track wording.
Report per-family F1 and monitor guard families (diagnosis, seizure type, annotated medication, investigation).
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
